product: Databricks Apps compute sizing support for compliance security profile standards

what_it_does: Compute sizing for Databricks Apps now supports all compliance security profile standards supported by Databricks and is available by default for workspaces with the compliance security profile enabled. For a full list of supported compliance standards, see Compliance security profile. This page describes the compliance security profile, its compliance controls, and supported features.
